description: The successor to reDuh, pwn a bastion webserver and create SOCKS proxies through the DMZ. Pivot and pwn.
post_install: & cmd /c "call activate python2env && pip install urllib3"
notes: 【主要功能】: The successor to reDuh, pwn a bastion webserver and create SOCKS proxies through the DMZ. Pivot and pwn.
【适用场景】: 内网穿透、SOCKS代理转发、DMZ绕过后渗透
【技术特点】: 基于Python开发，需Python环境
